Package com.example.junimoapp.models

Class User

java.lang.Object
com.example.junimoapp.models.User
public class User extends Object
Class defining user, includes profile information and role

    User(String deviceId, String name, String email, String phone, String organized, String invited, String waitlisted)
    Initializes user details, personal information, their role, and their events.

  • Constructor Details

    • User

      public User(String deviceId, String name, String email, String phone, String organized, String invited, String waitlisted)
      Initializes user details, personal information, their role, and their events.
      Parameters:
      deviceId - device id of the user
      name - use rename
      email - email
      phone - phone number
      organized - events that the user has organized (as organizer)
      invited - events that the user been invited to
      waitlisted - events that the user has waitlisted

      public void setNotificationsEnabled(boolean enabled)
      Sets that the user wants notifications and updates the users Firestore data
      Parameters:
      enabled - notifications enabled

    • inviteUser

      public void inviteUser(Event event)
      Invites user to an event Updates Firestore to add the event to the users invitedEvents
      Parameters:
      event - the event to invite the user to

    • isInvited

      public boolean isInvited(String eventID)

    • cancelUser

      public void cancelUser(Event event)
      Removes user from an event Updates Firestore to remove the event from the users invitedEvents
      Parameters:
      event - the event to remove the user from

    • isCancelled

      public boolean isCancelled(String eventID)

    • addOrganizedEvent

      public void addOrganizedEvent(Event event)
      States whether the user organizer the event Updates Firestore to add the event to the users organizedEvents, and local list
      Parameters:
      event - the event to add to the users organizedEvents

    • removeOrganizedEvent

      public void removeOrganizedEvent(Event event)
      Removes the event from the users organizedEvents Updates Firestore and local list to remove the event
      Parameters:
      event - the event to remove

    • joinEventWaitList

      public void joinEventWaitList(Event event)
      Adds user to the events waitlist Updates Firestore to add the event to the users waitlistedEvents, and local list
      Parameters:
      event - the event to add to the users waitlistedEvents

    • leaveEventWaitList

      public void leaveEventWaitList(Event event)
      Removes user from the events waitlist Updates Firestore to remove the event from the users waitlistedEvents, and local list
      Parameters:
      event - the event to user is leaving the waitList for

    • demoteOrganizer

      public void demoteOrganizer()
      Removes organizer access from a user Updates Firestore to remove events by this user from the users organizedEvents

      public void initializeEvents()

      eventList - list of events

      eventId - the id of the event to add

      public void removeCoOrganizerInvite(String eventId)
      Removes a co-organizer invite from the user Updates Firestore to remove the event from the users coOrganizerInvites
      Parameters:
      eventId - the id of the event to remove
